items.raw_excerpt: KASARAGOD: The Beautiful Game’... the people’s game... has inspired many traditions. And many linked to music have lingered, evoking emotions that bind communit
items.summary_en: A village in Kerala's Kasaragod district is highlighted for local traditions where football culture, verse, and music appear to overlap. The story focuses on community emotion and small-scale cultural life rather than major events.
items.title_en: Verse and Versatility Blend in a Kerala Village of Virtuosos

items.raw_excerpt: Temperatures dropped to -10.2 degrees Celsius in the Utrecht village of Cabauw overnight, marking the first severe frost of the season and the first time temperatures dropped below -10 degrees since January 2024, Weeronline reported. The icy cold weather will stick around for some time yet, with new snowfall expected tomorrow.
items.summary_en: Temperatures fell to -10.2 degrees Celsius overnight in Cabauw, a village in Utrecht, marking the first severe frost of the season. More icy weather and new snowfall were expected to continue the wintry spell.
items.title_en: Severe frost hits Utrecht village as more snow is expected
items.title_original: More snowfall, icy weather tomorrow; -10.2°C in Utrecht village overnight - NL Times

items.raw_excerpt: SANTA CLARA, California, June 16 : At the end of a 500-mile road trip from San Diego to San Jose, hundreds of Jordan fans marked the "small but mighty" nation's World Cup debut against Austria on Tuesday with singing, chanting and tributes to King Abdullah II outside the San Francisco Bay Area Stadium.A convo
items.summary_en: Hundreds of Jordan fans celebrated outside the San Francisco Bay Area Stadium after a 500-mile road trip from San Diego to San Jose. They marked Jordan's World Cup debut against Austria with singing, chanting, and tributes to King Abdullah II.
items.title_en: Road-tripping Jordan fans hail World Cup debut
items.title_original: Road-tripping Jordan fans hail World Cup debut

items.raw_excerpt: In Grafenwöhr hat das viertägige Kulturfest der Oberpfälzer, der sogenannte Nordgautag, begonnen. Grafenwöhr steht wie nahezu keine andere Kleinstadt in Bayern für ein multikulturelles Zusammenleben mit den US-Amerikanern.
items.summary_en: The four-day Nordgautag culture festival of the Upper Palatinate has begun in Grafenwoehr. The Bavarian small town is highlighted for its multicultural coexistence with Americans from the nearby U.S. community.
items.title_en: Upper Palatinate Culture Festival Nordgautag Starts in Grafenwoehr
items.title_original: Kulturfest der Oberpfälzer: Nordgautag in Grafenwöhr gestartet - BR

items.raw_excerpt: À Manchester, une commande bouleverse le destin d’un livreur de 78 ans, grâce à une cagnotte record. Comment est-ce arrivé ?
items.summary_en: A 78-year-old delivery driver in Manchester received a life-changing boost after an American woman started a fundraiser for his retirement. The campaign reportedly raised $800,000, turning a simple delivery order into a widely shared human-interest story.
items.title_en: American Raises $800,000 for 78-Year-Old Delivery Driver's Retirement
items.title_original: "Il mérite de se reposer" : une Américaine récolte 800.000 dollars pour la retraite d’un livreur de 78 ans - Pleine Vie

items.raw_excerpt: Voiko tuhansien ihmisten kaupunginosa olla yhteisö? Kävimme Kumpulassa testaamassa.

items.raw_excerpt: After twenty-five years of anticipation, Norway’s first dedicated cycling motorway, the Sykkelstamveien, officially opened on Tuesday, June 16th.
items.summary_en: Norway has officially opened its first dedicated cycling motorway, the Sykkelstamveien. The route opened on Tuesday, June 16, after twenty-five years of anticipation.
items.title_en: Norway opens landmark cycling highway
items.title_original: Norway opens landmark ‘cycling highway’

items.raw_excerpt: Es la primera mujer de su pueblo en la región Huasteca de la zona norte de Hidalgo en ser policía
items.summary_en: Reynalda Oaxaca became a police officer in Salamanca after challenging expectations about women from her community. The excerpt says she is the first woman from her town in the Huasteca region of northern Hidalgo to serve as a police officer.

items.title_en: Merlin, the World Cup Duck, may be the Mexican team’s biggest fan

items.raw_excerpt: Motoristas que circulam pelo bairro Boqueirão, em Curitiba, devem ficar atentos às mudanças no trânsito a partir desta quarta-feira (17). A Prefeitura de
items.summary_en: Drivers in Curitiba's Boqueirão neighborhood are being warned about traffic changes starting Wednesday, June 17. The disruption is linked to roadworks on Rua O Brasil para Cristo, with closures affecting local circulation.

items.raw_excerpt: Helsingin kaupunki suunnittelee Östersundomiin uusia asuin- työpaikka- ja luonnonsuojelualueita. Alueen osayleiskaavan luonnos perustuu laajoihin selvityksiin.
items.summary_en: The City of Helsinki is planning new housing, workplace areas, and nature conservation zones in Östersundom. The draft partial master plan is based on extensive studies and is open for public comment until the end of October.
items.title_en: Helsinki wants Östersundom to become a nature-oriented small rail town, with draft plan open for comments until the end of October

items.raw_excerpt: The Talking France podcast is back, looking at Emmanuel Macron's 'diplomatic swansong', debating whether Lyon is really the gastronomic capital of France, giving a tips for off-the-beaten track places to visit this summer and tackling the biggest question of all - does France really have half the world's roundabouts?
items.summary_en: The Talking France podcast returns with a mix of national politics, travel tips, and quirky everyday questions about France. Topics include Emmanuel Macron's diplomatic legacy, Lyon's reputation as France's gastronomic capital, lesser-known summer destinations, and France's love of roundabouts.
items.title_en: Podcast: Macron's swansong, why France is mad for roundabouts and how Lyon became the home of gastronomy
items.title_original: PODCAST 🎧: Macron’s swansong, why France is mad for roundabouts and how Lyon became the home of gastronomy

items.raw_excerpt: Vermont is home to more than 45 cheesemakers and produces some of the best cheese in the country. About a year ago, one of the state’s most historic brands got a chance to continue its legacy by teaming up with another to bring its cheese into the future.
items.summary_en: Grafton Village Cheese, one of Vermont's historic cheese brands, is continuing its legacy through a partnership with another local maker. The story highlights Vermont's strong cheesemaking tradition and a small food producer adapting for the future.
items.title_en: Historic Vermont Cheese Brand Looks to the Future
items.title_original: Made in Vermont: Grafton Village Cheese - WCAX
